pi_items.source: Created in setup_data.py lines 188-193 and summarized in line 555

privileged_info_summary: This task operates on a synthetic Odoo quality management system running at http://localhost:8069. The agent must log in with credentials admin/admin to access the odoo_quality database. The task requires finding a quality check named 'Visual Inspection - Cabinet Finish' (linked to the 'Cabinet with Doors' product, reset to 'none' state by setup) in the quality checks list view and marking it as 'Pass'. All data is synthetic, created programmatically via setup_data.py using Odoo's XML-RPC API. The verifier is a stub that always returns success; actual evaluation is done externally via VLM.
